name: Makoto Katai
description: With the face of a delinquent, Katai is actually a nervous, awkward wreck who constantly stumbles over his words, with a goal to overcome his own awkwardness and make friends. Tadano immediately sees through his false threatening nature and quickly becomes one of Katai's closest friends. He views Komi as his "master" and thinks she's constantly cheering him on to become better friends with Tadano.

name: North 2-gou
description: A Scottish robot with six mechanical armed arms, formerly one of the most powerful fighting robots during the 39th Central Asian War. He prefers not to fight, choosing instead to work as the butler of a blind renowned composer.

name: Poseidon
description: Poseidon is a prominent deity in the Greek Pantheon as the God of the Seas. ~!Poseidon is the Gods' representative in the third round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Sakamichi Onoda
description: Onoda Sakamichi is the main protagonist of the Yowamushi Pedal series who starts off as a new first-year student in Souhoku High School. He is a member of the Souhoku High Bicycle Club and specializes in climbing. Onoda is also an anime otaku, his favorite anime being Love Hime. He is known to sing the Love Hime Theme Song while climbing. description: Youko is a classmate of Asahi and the daughter of a human and a vampire. She has a Kansai accent, but speaks in honorifics so as not to expose her teeth. While initially coming across as haughty, her true personality is bubbly and absent minded. description: Sakura Kagamihara is the older sister of [Nadeshiko Kagamihara](https://anilist.co/character/124576). She often drives Nadeshiko to and from campsite destinations.

name: Satsuki Kusakabe
description: Satsuki is Mei's older sister. As they wait, Mei eventually falls asleep on Satsuki's back and Totoro appears beside them, allowing Satsuki to see him for the first time. He only has a leaf on his head for protection against the rain, so Satsuki offers him the umbrella she had taken along for her father. In return he gives her a bundle of nuts and seeds.

name: Seiha Shiunji
description: She is the second oldest Shiunji sibling, second only to her older sister [Banri Shiunji](https://anilist.co/character/265474/Banri-Shiunji). She is a third-year high school student, who is the valedictorian of her school and the Science Club president.

name: Shaula
description: Shaula is the overseer of the Pleiades Watchtower created by Flugel. She is tall, has dark green eyes and long brown blackish hair. Her outfit has a similar color scheme to that of Subaru. It is noted that the design for her outfit came from Flugel and her mother. Shaula is seen as empty-headed and unconcerned, yet Shaula has been shown to show deep emotion in certain situations especially with Subaru.

name: Sizhui Lan
description: A junior disciple of the Gusu Lan Sect. Born Wen Yuan, he's the last remaining blood descendant of the now-extinct Qishan Wen Sect. He was one of the Wen clan remnants taken in by Wei Wuxian shortly before his death, but he lost his home for a second time in the first siege of the Burial Mounds. Discovered by an injured Lan Wangji who came searching for Wei Wuxian's remains in the aftermath, the then-three-year-old boy fell into a high fever and lost all memories of his past. He’s the tsukkomi, the straight man, of the pair, and follows through with pointing out the idiocy Momo currently has on display. Surprisingly, Yuki is actually very easy to laugh or otherwise lose composure, usually as a result of the very actions of Momo’s he’s trying to correct.
